scripts.dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && pnpm --filter @rankpapa/api dev & pnpm --filter @rankpapa/worker dev & pnpm --filter @rankpapa/web dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rankpapa/shared build && pnpm --filter @rankpapa/api build && pnpm --filter @rankpapa/worker build && pnpm --filter @rankpapa/web build
